visa_types.name: Transit
visa_types.documents_required:
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form- Click Here 
- For all visa category additional set of documents are required.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Transit]
Visa fee payment method: The DEMAND DRAFT  must be CTS-2010 standard draft as per directive issued by the Reserve Bank of  India. It should be payable in New Delhi favoring “EMBASSY OF LEBANON”. Only  single demand draft would be acceptable for payment of Visa application charge.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
Service  charge:

[Table:   Transit]
VFS Service fee is payable in cash in  Nepalese currency.
visa_types.processing_time: Decisions about Lebanon visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Airport Transit Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Airport Transit Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Transit]
Visa fee payment method: The DEMAND DRAFT  must be CTS-2010 standard draft as per directive issued by the Reserve Bank of  India. It should be payable in New Delhi favoring “EMBASSY OF LEBANON”. Only  single demand draft would be acceptable for payment of Visa application charge.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants prepare their visa fees demand draft with an additional NPR 1250/-
Service  charge:

[Table:   Transit]
VFS Service fee is payable in cash in  Nepalese currency.

## Documents Required
Documents to be submitted with a visa application form- Click Here 
- For all visa category additional set of documents are required.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications

[lbn > npl > en > Table:   Business1]

[lbn > npl > en > Table:   Business2]

[lbn > npl > en > Table:   Business3]

[lbn > npl > en >Table:   Business4]

## Processing Time
Decisions about Lebanon visa applications must normally be made within 15 days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry. In these cases, the maximum processing time is 30 days. In exceptionally difficult cases the processing time can be up to 60 days.

## Download Forms
Application Form

visa_types.name: Document Legalization Service
visa_types.overview:
Description: 

Since Lebanon is not a signatory to The Hague Apostille Convention, any official document destined for this country will be legalized by the Lebanon Embassy for consular and commercial purposes. Legalizing documents for Lebanon may require additional steps before the documents can be presented to the Lebanon Embassy or Consulate office.We accept documents from individuals and representatives on behalf of MEA, Embassy of UAE and Lebanon Embassy to provide a quick and 100% genuine attestation/apostille service. VFS Global also offers a gamut of services that simplifies the entire process of attestation/Apostille with:
- State Attestation
- HRD Attestations
- Chamber of Commerce attestation
- Translation Services
visa_types.full_text:
Description: 

Since Lebanon is not a signatory to The Hague Apostille Convention, any official document destined for this country will be legalized by the Lebanon Embassy for consular and commercial purposes. Legalizing documents for Lebanon may require additional steps before the documents can be presented to the Lebanon Embassy or Consulate office.We accept documents from individuals and representatives on behalf of MEA, Embassy of UAE and Lebanon Embassy to provide a quick and 100% genuine attestation/apostille service. VFS Global also offers a gamut of services that simplifies the entire process of attestation/Apostille with:
- State Attestation
- HRD Attestations
- Chamber of Commerce attestation
- Translation Services

## Legalization for the Lebanon Mission shall now be under the purview of VFS Global and you may submit your applications to our dedicated Application centres for any legalization request to the Lebanon Embassy, India.

[lbl > npl > en > Document Legalization Service ]

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Business Visa is given to those who are doing business in Lebanon such as making sales or establishing contacts on behalf of a company outside Nepal.
